description_long: This is a large, metallic wrench with a long, rectangular handle and a wide, U-shaped jaw at one end. The handle is solid and appears to be made of steel, featuring a series of evenly spaced markings or indentations along its length, likely for measurement or grip. The jaw section is robust and angular, with a fixed opening that suggests it is designed for use on large bolts or pipes. The surface of the wrench is smooth and has a dark, slightly glossy finish, indicating a protective coating against corrosion. There are no visible moving parts, making this a fixed-jaw wrench, and the overall construction appears heavy-duty, suitable for industrial or urban maintenance tasks. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, giving it a utilitarian appearance.
description: A large, dark metallic wrench with a long handle and a wide, fixed U-shaped jaw, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy finish and robust construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wrench, highlighting the long handle and the thick, angular jaw section.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open U-shaped jaw and the flat, broad face of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, again emphasizing the length and solid build of the wrench.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the jaw and the straight, narrow handle extending away.
